title: ADULT. with Plaque, Nightmare - Live at The EARL
location: The EARL, 488 Flat Shoals Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
description: Post-punk/new wave duo ADULT. brings their driving rhythms and anxious electronic textures to The EARL. A great intro to live music for couples who like something darker and more atmospheric.

title: Poetry vs. Hip-Hop Live Show - National Poetry Month Tour
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Queen Sheba, Malik Yusef and Jessica Care Moore perform. Intimate venue, wine, spoken word meets hip-hop. Sophisticated date night energy.

title: Open Studios at Atlanta Contemporary
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Walk through working artist studios, meet creatives, explore the space. Great low-pressure cultural date that's also free.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 1
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's iconic spring festival moves to new park venue. Headliners: Umphrey's McGee + Thievery Corporation. Craft brews, skyline views, great vibes. Perfect for couples who love outdoor festivals.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 2
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Day 2 of the fest with lespecial, The Moss, Sneezy and more. Outdoor dancing, food vendors, relaxed atmosphere. Great spring date under the open sky.

title: Helium Presents: John Caparulo
location: Helium Comedy Club, 4930 Old National Hwy #4, College Park, GA 30337
description: Sharp-witted stand-up from the 'Mad Max' comedian. Helium has great drinks and appetizers. Low-key funny date night.

title: "15 MINUTES" Opening Reception at Gallery Anderson Smith
location: 1401 Peachtree St NE, Ste. A200, Atlanta, GA 30309
description: Contemporary art exhibit opening with wine and light bites. Submission-based show with rotating themes. Sophisticated, Instagram-worthy art date.

title: Atlanta Contemporary Open Studios
location: Atlanta Contemporary Art Center, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Tour working artist studios, meet working creatives, explore installations. Low-pressure cultural date.

title: Pours & Punchlines | Stand-Up Comedy Showcase
description: Comedy show + drinks at the Beltline's favorite taproom. Local comics, solid craft beers. Casual, fun, low-key date vibe.

title: Fantastic Cat with Duuuuse
description: Indie rock quartet known for hooky songs and theatrical live shows. Great pick for couples into discovery-type music dates.

title: King Tuff at TBA
description: Psychedelic rock and roll from Kyle Thomas. Catchy, colorful, fun live show. Affordable and energetic.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Amapiano, Afrobeats & More
description: Atlanta's hottest Afrobeat/Amapiano party. Dancing, vibes, good crowd. Perfect for couples who love to dance and enjoy global Black music.

title: Atlanta Veg Week - Various Partner Restaurants
description: Citywide celebration of plant-based eating. Dozens of restaurants offer special vegan menus. Great opportunity to explore new vegetarian spots together.

title: Open Mic Night at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 4930 Old National Hwy #4, College Park, GA
description: Discover rising local comedians. Cheap drinks, casual atmosphere. Spontaneous and fun for couples who like to laugh.
